name: Steve Holden
bio: Steve Holden serves as the County Attorney for Morris County, handling criminal prosecutions and providing legal guidance to the county. He is dedicated to upholding the law and serving the residents of Daingerfield and the surrounding area.
campaignPromises: Effectively prosecute criminal cases in Morris County
Protect the legal interests of the county
Operate a fiscally responsible county attorney's office
Coordinate with law enforcement on public safety efforts
